title: enterosora humbertii
intro: Enterosora humbertii is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to Madagascar. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Enterosora humbertii include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction, where its leaves are steeped in hot water to create a tea, or as a tincture, to be used in herbal medicine.
